# Markson Rebelo Marcolino

> Brazilian engineer based in Madrid. 15 years in tech, now shipping data platforms, voice AI, and full-stack products. Published researcher in educational data science.

## About

- Data Engineer currently based in Madrid, Spain (originally from Brazil).
- 15 years in tech spanning teaching computer science, project management, support engineering, data science, and data engineering.
- Domain experience: telecom, healthcare, education, e-commerce, voice AI, blockchain.
- 4 peer-reviewed academic publications including Nature Scientific Reports.
- Speaks Portuguese (native), Spanish, English, and French.

## Current work

- [Serena](https://serena.ia.br/) — Clinical coordination platform for Brazilian hospice and palliative care teams. LGPD and ANVISA compliant. Live.
- [nanoncore](https://nanoncore.com/) — Telecom and ISP management platform. GPON fiber management, real-time network monitoring, metrics dashboards. Live.
- [voz](https://github.com/MarksonMarcolino/voz) — Self-hosted voice conversational AI for Brazilian Portuguese and Rioplatense Spanish. Open source.

## Recent roles

- Data Engineer at Accenture, Madrid (Sep 2025 – Jan 2026): scalable data platforms on GCP, CI/CD via Terraform and Azure DevOps, ELT operationalization.
- Data Scientist at NEES, São Paulo (Aug 2024 – Jul 2025): analyzed 10M+ student records, built geospatial dashboards across 5,000+ Brazilian schools.
- Data Scientist at Eattasty, Lisbon (Apr 2023 – Feb 2024): advanced analytics in Dremio/MongoDB, BI dashboards across Metabase/Superset/Looker/Power BI.

## Stack

- **Languages:** Python, Go, TypeScript, SQL, Bash
- **Data:** BigQuery, PostgreSQL, TimescaleDB, MongoDB, Redis, VictoriaMetrics, Dremio
- **Cloud:** GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage), AWS, Oracle Cloud
- **AI/ML:** PyTorch, XGBoost, Random Forest, Scikit-learn, Claude API, Ollama
- **Backend:** FastAPI, Go stdlib, SQLAlchemy
- **Frontend:** Vue 3, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- **DevOps:** Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines

## Publications

- [Student dropout prediction through machine learning optimization: insights from moodle log data](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-025-93918-1) — Nature Scientific Reports, 2025 (Lead Author)
- [Understanding School Factors Related to Student Absenteeism in Brazilian Public High Schools: Insights for Educational Policy Through a Clustering Approach](https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-981-95-7580-0_14) — Springer, 2025 (Lead Author)
- [Ensuring Data Quality in National Educational Databases: Insights from Brazil's Centralized Database of High School Students' Data](https://proceedings.open.tudelft.nl/DGO2025/article/view/943) — DGO 2025, TU Delft (Co-author)
- [Leveraging String Similarity Algorithms for Educational Data Validation: A Scalable Approach for Digital Governance](https://proceedings.open.tudelft.nl/DGO2025/article/view/942) — DGO 2025, TU Delft (Co-author)

## Education

- Master's in Information and Communication Technologies, Universidade Federal de Santa Catarina (2024–2025). Thesis on ML-based student dropout prediction using Moodle data.
- Bachelor's in Information and Communication Technologies, Universidade Federal de Santa Catarina (2010–2015).
